rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, And Requests For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, September 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Marcal Associates, Ltd.¿s motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories, requests for admission and requests for production of documents was continued from August 25 to September 1 at the moving party¿s request presumably to give the parties more time to engage in meet and confer efforts. The court is not aware if those efforts have been successful in whole or in part. If all issues raised by the motion are not fully resolved before then, by 4pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain and then appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on September 1, 2010 in Department 220. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD SHARP VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant United Refrigeration, Inc. To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, September 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff RICHARD SHARP¿s motion to compel defendant United Refrigeration, Inc. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable, and to produce documents at deposition may or may not be moot based on events that have occurred since the motion was filed. If all issues raised by the motion are not fully resolved before then, by 4pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain and then appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on September 1, 2010 in Department 220. = (220/HEK)
